fields.Name: Whiteboard
fields.Description: Live shared whiteboard surface for realtime voice sessions: the user and the agent co-draw on a shared board; the agent perceives coalesced scene deltas and acts through Whiteboard.* client-executed tools. Session state of record persists on the session channel row.

fields.Name: Remote Browser
fields.Description: Gives a realtime voice co-agent a live web browser. CLIENT-DIRECT: the agent's browser-driving tools execute client-side (RealtimeRemoteBrowserChannel) and relay each action to the server-side RemoteBrowserEngine via the ExecuteRemoteBrowserAction mutation, which lazily launches the browser on first use. The server channel plugin is lifecycle-only — it tears the browser down when the session ends and contributes no server tools.

fields.Name: Media
fields.Description: Shared media display surface for realtime voice sessions: the agent shows the user visuals during the call (images, video, audio, PDFs, web pages) through Media.* client-executed tools. Each item opens in its own tab; the agent can switch between them and highlight regions to point at specifics. Session state of record persists on the session channel row.

fields.Name: ClientContextChannel
fields.Description: HEADLESS live wire (no visible tab) that continuously streams the user's app context to the realtime co-agent — where they are, what they see, and the available client-tool + agent manifest — and through which the model's single stable ContextTool proxy drives in-app actions. CLIENT-DIRECT: the browser publishes context deltas via the provider's SendContextNote and executes ContextTool/client-tool calls locally (no server round-trip). The server channel plugin contributes no server tools and persists no state.
